body:
* \[[`a71f95c018`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/a71f95c018)] - **(SEMVER-MINOR)** **feat(test-optimization)**: create final\_status tag on test event for cypress (Sebastián Kay) [#8025](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8025)
* \[[`d3ed9d79ac`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/d3ed9d79ac)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** fix sirun scope benchmark waiting without using cpu (Roch Devost) [#8037](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8037)
* \[[`80b9c50664`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/80b9c50664)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **chore**: simplify trace propagation env and logger implementation (Ruben Bridgewater) [#7977](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/7977)

* \[[`56f6a32f89`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/56f6a32f89)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **chore**: do not report isServiceNameInferred telemetry (Ruben Bridgewater) [#8019](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8019)

* \[[`21db68acc7`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/21db68acc7)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **fix(serverless)**: prevent serverless benchmarks on merges to release branches (Olivier Nzia) [#8024](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8024)
* \[[`3e74642042`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/3e74642042)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** **ci**: integrate parallel benchmarks from apm-sdks-benchmarks (Fayssal DEFAA) [#7996](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/7996)

* \[[`91205a5f6d`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/91205a5f6d)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** \[test optimization] suppress quarantined test errors to prevent Jest --bail from stopping execution (Juan Antonio Fernández de Alba) [#8015](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/8015)
* \[[`639037f46b`](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/commit/639037f46b)] - **(SEMVER-PATCH)** \[test optimization] Decouple instrumentation layer from tracer (Juan Antonio Fernández de Alba) [#7989](https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-js/pull/7989)
